mapper.select: SELECT o.*, p.id as product_order_id, p.title as product_title, p.price as product_price, p.status as product_status, b.id as buyer_user_id, b.name as buyer_name, b.student_id as buyer_student_id, b.phone as buyer_phone, b.avatar as buyer_avatar, s.id as seller_user_id, s.name as seller_name, s.student_id as seller_student_id, s.phone as seller_phone, s.avatar as seller_avatar FROM `order` o LEFT JOIN product p ON o.product_id = p.id LEFT JOIN `user` b ON o.buyer_id = b.id LEFT JOIN `user` s ON o.seller_id = s.id WHERE o.id = #{id}

SELECT o.*, p.id as product_order_id, p.title as product_title, p.price as product_price, p.status as product_status, b.id as buyer_user_id, b.name as buyer_name, b.student_id as buyer_student_id, b.phone as buyer_phone, b.avatar as buyer_avatar, s.id as seller_user_id, s.name as seller_name, s.student_id as seller_student_id, s.phone as seller_phone, s.avatar as seller_avatar, (SELECT url FROM image WHERE product_id = p.id ORDER BY sort_order ASC LIMIT 1) as product_first_image_url FROM `order` o LEFT JOIN product p ON o.product_id = p.id LEFT JOIN `user` b ON o.buyer_id = b.id LEFT JOIN `user` s ON o.seller_id = s.id WHERE o.buyer_id = #{buyerId} ORDER BY o.created_at DESC

SELECT o.*, p.id as product_order_id, p.title as product_title, p.price as product_price, p.status as product_status, b.id as buyer_user_id, b.name as buyer_name, b.student_id as buyer_student_id, b.phone as buyer_phone, b.avatar as buyer_avatar, s.id as seller_user_id, s.name as seller_name, s.student_id as seller_student_id, s.phone as seller_phone, s.avatar as seller_avatar, (SELECT url FROM image WHERE product_id = p.id ORDER BY sort_order ASC LIMIT 1) as product_first_image_url FROM `order` o LEFT JOIN product p ON o.product_id = p.id LEFT JOIN `user` b ON o.buyer_id = b.id LEFT JOIN `user` s ON o.seller_id = s.id WHERE o.seller_id = #{sellerId} ORDER BY o.created_at DESC
SELECT * FROM `order` WHERE product_id = #{productId} AND status IN (0, 1) LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO `order` (product_id, buyer_id, seller_id, price, status, remark, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{productId}, #{buyerId}, #{sellerId}, #{price}, 0, #{remark}, NOW(), NOW())
